zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Farrar於1576年5月10日出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾波利時，他的父親John Farrar25歲，母親Isabell Houghton27歲。他於1610年與Athellred Agnes Flournoy在英國英格蘭藍卡爾波利結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1643年被列為constable。他去世於1624年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾波利享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Farrar于1576年5月10日出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾波利时，他的父亲John Farrar25岁，母亲Isabell Houghton27岁。他于1610年与Athellred Agnes Flournoy在英国英格兰藍卡爾波利结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1643年被列为constable。他去世于1624年在英国英格兰藍卡爾波利享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Farrar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): occupational name for a blacksmith or worker in iron. From Middle English fer(r)o(u)r, fer(r)er, fa(r)ro(u)r ‘ironworker, blacksmith’ (Old French ferreor, from medieval Latin ferrator, an agent derivative of ferrare ‘to shoe horses’, from ferrum ‘iron’, in medieval Latin ‘horseshoe’). Compare Ferrier and Farrow .

variants.name: Ferrer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Luis, Francisco, Miguel, Juan, Jorge, Carlos, Angel, Pedro, Roberto, Manuel, Ramon.
Catalan and southern French: from Latin ferrarius ‘ironworker, blacksmith’, either an occupational name or from the same word as an old personal name. This is the commonest Catalan surname.
English: variant of   Farrar  .

variants.name: Farrer
meanings: English: variant of   Farrar  .
German: variant of   Forer   or   Fahrer  .

variants.name: Ferrar
meanings: English: variant of   Farrar  .

variants.name: Ferro
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Antonio, Angelo, Mario, Pasquale, Alberto, Antonino, Bernardo, Guido, Carmine, Concetta, Dino, Ottavio, Pietro, Rocco.  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Luis, Carlos, Ramon, Eduardo, Fermin, Sixto, Angel.

Italian, Spanish, Portuguese, and Maltese: from ferro ‘iron’ (from Latin ferrum), used as a nickname denoting someone who was strong or as a metonymic occupational name for someone who produced or worked iron.
Italian: from a medieval personal name, preserved in the modern pet form Ferruccio.

variants.name: Fara
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Eduardo, Carlos, Mario.
Italian (Sardinia): occupational name from Sardinian fara ‘messenger, courier, collector’.
Czech and Slovak (also Fára): topographic name from fara ‘priest's house’.

variants.name: Farrow
meanings: English (northern): hypercorrected form of Farrar , an occupational name for a smith or worker in iron. The original -ar or -er ending of this name came to be regarded as an error, and was changed to -ow.

variants.name: Farrah
meanings: English: variant of   Farrar  .
Americanized form of Arabic   Farah  .

variants.name: Ferrier
meanings: Scottish and English: occupational name for a smith, one who shoed horses, from Old French ferrier ‘blacksmith, ironworker’ (medieval Latin ferrarius, from ferrus ‘horseshoe’, from Latin ferrum ‘iron’). Compare Farrier , Farrar .

Scottish and English: occupational name for a ferryman, from Middle English ferier(e) ‘ferryman’. Black reports that lands called Ferrylands in Dumbarton, by a ferry across the Clyde, belonged to Robert Ferrier in 1512.
French: occupational name from Old French ferrier ‘blacksmith, farrier’ (see 1 above).

variants.name: Farra
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Ammar, Bassel, Fadi, Fadia, Farid, Hazem, Nabil, Nadim, Salem, Samir, Waseem, Yasser.  French Henri, Marcel.
English: variant of   Farrar  .
Arabic (the Levant): possibly a variant of   Farah  . Bearers of this surname are both Muslims and Christians.

variants.name: Furrow
meanings: Probably an altered form of English Farrow (see Farrar ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Farrar was born on 10 May 1576, in Burnley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Farrar, was 25 and his mother, Isabell Houghton, was 27. He married Athellred Agnes Flournoy in 1610, in Burnley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. In 1643, his occupation is listed as constable. He died in 1624, in Burnley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Farrar est né le 10 mai 1576, à Burnley, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Farrar, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Isabell Houghton, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Athellred Agnes Flournoy en 1610, à Burnley, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. En 1643, sa profession de son indiquée est constable. Il est décédé en 1624, à Burnley, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Farrar am 10. Mai 1576 in Burnley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Farrar 25 und seine Mutter Isabell Houghton 27. Er hat 1610 in Burnley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Athellred Agnes Flournoy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1643 ist sein Beruf als constable aufgeführt. Er starb 1624 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Burnley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

Lui sposato Athellred Agnes Flournoy nel 1610, nel Burnley, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1643, la sua occupazione è indicata come constable. Morì nel 1624, nel Burnley, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni.

ko.St Peter's Church, Burnley, Lancashire,: 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 번리 스트 피터'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Farrar(이)가 1576년 5월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 번리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Farrar(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabell Houghton(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1610년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 번리에서 Athellred Agnes Flournoy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1643년, 그의 직업은 constable이었다. 그는 1624년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 번리에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Farrar nasceu em 10 de maio de 1576, em Burnley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Farrar, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Isabell Houghton, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Athellred Agnes Flournoy em 1610, em Burnley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1643, sua profissão aparece como constable. Ele faleceu em 1624, em Burnley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 48 anos.

ru.St Peter's Church, Burnley, Lancashire,: ст питир'с чурч, бурнли, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Farrar родился 10 мая 1576 г. в местности бурнли, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Farrar было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabell Houghton, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Athellred Agnes Flournoy в 1610 г. в местности бурнли, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. В 1643 году он работал по профессии constable. Он умер в 1624 г. в местности бурнли, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет.

Se casó con Athellred Agnes Flournoy en 1610, en Burnley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1643, su ocupación registrada era constable. Murió en 1624, en Burnley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 48 años.
